items.title: Clean Up Unused Nickname Functionality in Wisdom 🎉
items.summary: This update removes the unused `get_self_nickname` function from the extraction module, as it had no active callers and was redundant with `get_self_info`. The change includes updates to several test files to reflect this removal, ensuring that the codebase remains clean and efficient. Local tests passed successfully, confirming the integrity of the remaining functionality.

items.title: Enhance Seedance Support for 4K and 15s Duration in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update expands the Seedance video handling capabilities by adding support for 4K resolution and increasing the maximum duration to 15 seconds. The changes include modifications to the validation rules, ensuring compatibility with the seedance-2.0 family. This aligns with recent updates in the PlatformBackend, enhancing overall functionality.

items.title: Enhance Short Drama Captions in Platform Service 🎬
items.summary: This update introduces version 1.4.1 of the short-drama skill, focusing on two key improvements. Captions now reflect the exact spoken lines from the drama, ensuring a single source of truth, while clips are trimmed to eliminate silent tails, enhancing the viewing experience. These changes aim to improve synchronization and overall quality of the output.

items.title: Documentation updated with merged parity PRs in Index 🚀
items.summary: All four parity PRs have been successfully merged, resulting in a minor documentation update. Key changes include adjustments in the README to reflect the integration of new features and alignments across various APIs and SDKs. This update ensures that the documentation remains accurate and up-to-date with the latest developments.

items.title: Exciting New VS Code and JetBrains Plugins Added in M C Ps 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a VS Code extension and a JetBrains plugin for the AceDataCloud MCP server, enhancing user accessibility. Key changes include the addition of a generator script, updated README files, and new configuration settings for both platforms. These tools will streamline account management and improve integration with the Ace Data Cloud services.

items.title: Exciting New Face and Short URL Features in S D K 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces new resources for face transformations and short URL creation across Python, TypeScript, and Go SDKs. The Go SDK has been brought to parity with Python and TypeScript by adding video, audio, and search functionalities. Key improvements enhance the overall service coverage and consistency across platforms.

items.title: New API Guides for Producer, Fish, Face, and ShortURL in A P Is 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces comprehensive API guides for the Producer, Fish, Face, and ShortURL services. Each service now has dedicated directories with README files and integration guides, enhancing developer access to essential information. Additionally, the sync.yaml file has been updated to reflect these new services, ensuring seamless integration.

items.title: Comprehensive Ecosystem Parity Audit Completed in Index 🚀
items.summary: We conducted a thorough parity audit across all service surfaces, including Skills, CLIs, MCPs, APIs, SDKs, and connectors. Key findings revealed several gaps, such as four hosted MCP endpoints being down and multiple API and CLI directories unpublished. The audit has been verified and is now documented for future reference.

items.title: Enhance Seedream Pricing and Model Support in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the doubao-seedream-5.0-lite model with a new official price structure at fx6.8. The consumption calculations have been adjusted, and legacy support for the 3.0/seededit models is maintained. All 844 API cost tests have successfully passed, ensuring stability and performance.

items.title: Align Android & iOS Card CTAs for Consistency in Nexior 🎨
items.summary: This update addresses the misalignment of primary call-to-action buttons on the download cards for Android and iOS. By top-aligning footers and equalizing the description min-height, the QR codes and buttons now line up correctly, enhancing the user experience. The changes are implemented using CSS only, ensuring a clean and efficient solution.

items.title: Enhanced Maestro Worker Capacity in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: The Maestro worker configuration has been updated to increase the number of replicas from 3 to 6. This change enhances throughput and improves restart resilience by ensuring that more jobs can be processed simultaneously without orphaning in-flight tasks. The deployment adjustments are aimed at optimizing resource utilization within the cluster.

items.title: Enhance Image Edits with Base64 Support in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces support for base64 image inputs in the gpt-image-2 edits feature, allowing users to submit images as data URLs. The changes affect three channel workers, enabling them to decode base64 images for multipart uploads while maintaining existing HTTP and multipart paths. New tests have been added to ensure functionality and reliability.

items.title: Introducing Codex Subscription Proxy for CLI in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the codex-proxy, which wraps the CLIProxyAPI on the Silicon Valley cluster, providing an OpenAI/Codex-compatible API backed by a ChatGPT Codex subscription. Key changes include the addition of deployment configurations, service definitions, and a public ingress for accessing the proxy. This enhancement allows for seamless integration and usage of Codex capabilities within the platform.

items.title: Revamped README for Clarity in Wisdom 🚀
items.summary: The README has been refreshed to reflect the current project structure, including updates to the WeChat services and the merging of repository packages. Stale files such as automation/contacts.py and the Alembic directory have been removed, simplifying the documentation. The focus is now on a single-node SQLite setup, ensuring easier understanding for new contributors.

items.title: Refactor repository structure for better organization in Wisdom 🚀
items.summary: This update refactors the repository by splitting the large `repository.py` file into multiple per-entity packages, enhancing modularity and maintainability. Key files such as account, contact, conversation, group, and message repositories have been created, while maintaining backward compatibility through re-exports. All existing repository mock tests have passed successfully.

items.title: Clean Up Code and Optimize CDN Uploads in Wisdom 🚀
items.summary: This update removes unused code, including the `message_exists` function and navigation actions for conversations, resulting in a reduction of 633 lines. Additionally, the CDN upload functionality has been streamlined by merging duplicate uploaders into a single utility, enhancing efficiency and maintainability. The changes improve the overall performance of the Wisdom project while ensuring that existing features remain intact.

items.title: Enhance macOS Permissions in Nexior 🌟
items.summary: This update introduces macOS TCC permission tiers in the LocalTools panel, enhancing user control over system permissions. Key changes include new IPC handlers and entitlements for screen, microphone, camera, and automation access. Users can now view permission statuses and jump directly to System Settings for adjustments, improving the overall user experience.

items.title: Revamped Volcengine Pricing for Seedance in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update includes a complete rebuild of the cost structure for the Seedance service based on the official Volcengine pricing at fx6.8. Key changes involve the addition of new pricing rules and adjustments to existing ones, resulting in 843 passing API cost tests. The modifications enhance the accuracy of cost calculations for various video resolutions and audio configurations.

items.title: Enhance fish catalog parsing for better performance in Platform Service 🎣
items.summary: This update clarifies the fish catalog response structure, ensuring the agent correctly parses the 'items' instead of 'data'. The change restores the catalog-first persona casting, improving the overall functionality of the voice casting feature. The fix enhances the user experience by providing accurate data retrieval.

items.title: Enhance Frida Inbound Persistence & Clean Up Naming in Wisdom 🚀
items.summary: This update addresses critical issues with Frida's inbound message persistence, ensuring that messages are correctly processed and stored in the database. Key changes include the addition of regression tests, improved naming conventions, and the removal of unnecessary files. Overall, these enhancements improve the reliability and maintainability of the Wisdom application.

items.title: Enhance macOS Permissions Design for Nexior in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a comprehensive design for macOS TCC permission tiers, including folder access and various system permissions. Key files have been modified and a new permissions document has been added, detailing the entitlements and bookmark persistence strategies. These changes aim to improve user experience while ensuring necessary permissions are handled effectively.

items.title: Enhance Local Tools Settings Page in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new settings page for local tools, allowing users to authorize root folders for local execution. Key files added include a dedicated Vue component for the settings interface and necessary routing updates. The changes improve the user experience by enabling local folder management directly within the desktop application.

items.title: Enhance Render Accuracy with New Aspect Rules in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update implements strict aspect ratio enforcement for rendering, ensuring that the agent adheres to specified dimensions. Key changes include making aspect and duration hard directives, rejecting incorrect aspect ratios during preflight checks, and reinforcing authoring rules for layout safety. These improvements aim to eliminate rendering defects and enhance overall visual quality.

items.title: Enhance Dock Icon and Fix Launch Issue in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a refined squircle dock icon for macOS, ensuring it no longer fills the square completely. Additionally, the app now loads from the root URL instead of /index.html, eliminating the 404 flash during startup. These changes enhance the user experience and visual appeal of the application.

items.title: Deploy Manifests for Webextrator in M C Ps 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces deployment manifests for the Webextrator MCP, including deployment, service, and ingress configurations. Key additions include the setup for hosting on webextrator.mcp.acedata.cloud with NGINX routing and TLS support. These changes enhance the deployment process and ensure better accessibility and security for the service.

items.title: Pixverse API Documentation Removed in A P Is 🚀
items.summary: The Pixverse API documentation has been delisted as the service is now marked as private. Key files, including the main README and several integration guides, have been removed to align with the platform's updated status. This change ensures that the documentation reflects the current accessibility of the Pixverse API.

items.title: Exciting New Seedream Image Generation API Docs Added in A P Is 🚀
items.summary: We've added comprehensive documentation for the Seedream Image Generation API, including a README and two integration guides. Key features include support for multiple models and sizes, along with a streamlined sync.yaml for easier integration. This update enhances accessibility for developers looking to utilize the Seedream service.

items.title: Enhance Dock Icon for Dev Runs in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update fixes the issue where the default Electron icon was displayed in the Dock during development runs. The app now sets the branded dock icon when running in development mode on macOS, ensuring a consistent look with the packaged DMG. Key changes include the addition of a new JSON configuration and modifications to the main Electron file.

items.title: Align Code with SPEC for Enhanced Functionality in Wisdom 🚀
items.summary: This update implements the merged SPEC, introducing DB-only contacts and a new media endpoint for messages. Key changes include the removal of history endpoints and updates to the message handling process, which now excludes the sender in certain cases. These modifications aim to streamline data retrieval and improve overall system performance.

items.title: Enhance Failover Logic for Header Timeouts in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new policy to enable failover when response headers are not received within the specified timeout. The header timeout has been reduced from 3600 seconds to 360 seconds, aligning with vendor standards. Tests confirm that failover occurs correctly when the new policy is enabled, ensuring better reliability during upstream outages.

items.title: Enhanced Fallback for Official GPT Image in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a reverse fallback mechanism for the `gpt-image-2:official` model, ensuring continuity during cortex outages. A new `br-official` channel has been added to the router configmap, allowing the fallback to serve requests when cortex is unavailable. Key modifications were made to the routing logic and tests to accommodate this change, enhancing reliability and performance.

items.title: Enhance Lip-Sync and Voice Casting in Platform Service 🎭
items.summary: This update introduces version 1.4 of the short-drama skill, focusing on improved lip-sync reliability and voice casting. Key changes include a new retry mechanism for r2v, upfront voice casting in voices.json, and enhanced story coherence through structured beat sheets. These enhancements aim to ensure a seamless storytelling experience without silent gaps or dropped lines.

items.title: Enhance Desktop Client Tool Execution in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the ability for the aichat2 worker to accept and register client tools for local execution on desktop. Key changes include modifications to the conversations handler and orchestrator to support tool execution that pauses for user input, mirroring the ask_user_question functionality. This enhancement allows for a more interactive experience, enabling desktop clients to run tools and resume processing seamlessly.

items.title: Enhance Local Tool Execution and Config Management in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces local tool routing and configuration management for desktop users in Nexior. Key changes include the injection of local tools into aichat2, the ability to run client tools locally, and enhancements to the IPC for configuration handling. These improvements set the stage for a more seamless user experience in local execution workflows.

items.title: Fix GSAP Vendorization and CDN References Across All Skills in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update vendors GSAP 3.15.0 and rewrites all CDN references across 87 skills to ensure consistent styling in teaching videos. The changes prevent unstyled frames by eliminating reliance on external CDNs, which are inaccessible in the worker sandbox. Additionally, authoring rules have been updated to enforce local asset usage, enhancing reliability across the platform.

items.title: Comprehensive Alignment of Current Architecture in Wisdom 🚀
items.summary: This update brings a thorough alignment of the `SPEC.md` document with the current architecture, transitioning from a pure UI Automation model to a hybrid approach. Key changes include the removal of outdated components, the introduction of asynchronous task handling, and a complete media restructuring. These adjustments enhance the overall functionality and maintainability of the project.

items.title: Launch Local Tool Execution Foundation in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This PR establishes the foundational framework for local tool execution in the Nexior desktop application. Key components include modules for file system access, command execution, and local MCP server integration, all gated by user consent. The implementation is currently inert, awaiting further PRs to activate functionality.

items.title: Enhance Desktop Experience with Frameless Window Chrome in Nexior 🎉
items.summary: This update introduces a frameless window chrome for desktop users, enhancing the user interface on macOS and Windows/Linux. Key changes include a draggable header and adjusted title bar styles to improve usability. The header now serves as a drag handle, ensuring a seamless experience across platforms.

items.title: Align Custom Payload with OpenAPI in Clis 🚀
items.summary: This update synchronizes the `--negative-style` parameter in the CLI with the OpenAPI specification by mapping it to `style_negative`. The change ensures that the request bodies sent to the Suno API are consistent with the defined schema, enhancing overall reliability. Additionally, regression tests have been added to verify that the correct field is used in the outbound JSON.

items.title: Enhance Desktop Experience with App Menu and Notifications in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces several key features for the Nexior desktop app, including an app menu that restores clipboard accelerators, a minimum window size to prevent layout issues, and an allowlist for PayPal to enable seamless checkout. Additionally, OS notifications have been implemented to ensure reliable alerts even when the app is minimized. These enhancements aim to improve user interaction and overall functionality.

items.title: Sync CLI Options with Latest API Docs in Clis 🚀
items.summary: This update aligns the `veo` CLI options with the latest OpenAPI specifications, ensuring command validation is consistent with the backend contract. Key changes include the removal of unsupported model enums, updates to aspect ratios, and the introduction of regression tests to prevent contract drift. Additionally, user-facing documentation has been updated for clarity and accuracy.

items.title: Enhance Audio Documentation with Title and Vocal Gender Details in Backend 🎶
items.summary: This update improves the audio documentation by adding specific details regarding the title length and vocal gender preferences based on the Suno API specifications. The title can now have a maximum of 80 characters for certain models and 100 for others, while the vocal gender field has been clarified to indicate it as a preference rather than a strict requirement. These changes aim to provide clearer guidance for users integrating with the Suno API.

items.title: Update gpt-image-2 cost remark for clarity in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update corrects the cost-rule remark for the `gpt-image-2` model, clarifying that it defaults to the reverse channel. The previous remark was misleading, and the new text enhances understanding for users. All tests passed successfully, ensuring no impact on logic or billing.

items.title: Streamlined OpenAPI Cost Sync for Live Workers in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update synchronizes the OpenAPI cost with live upstream workers for the VEO, FLUX, and Seedance services. Key changes include the removal of the outdated `veo2` model, the addition of `flux-pro-1.1`, and the cleanup of dead models in Seedance. These adjustments ensure accurate pricing and improved functionality across the platform.

items.title: New Planning Docs for Nexior Desktop Client in Index 🚀
items.summary: We've introduced two comprehensive planning documents for the Nexior desktop client, focusing on platform adaptation and local execution capabilities. The first document outlines necessary adaptations for Windows and macOS, identifying gaps in the current implementation. The second document proposes a design for executing local commands, enhancing user experience by eliminating the need for a separate daemon.

items.title: Restoring Seedance 1.x Models in A P Is 🚀
items.summary: This update reverts the previous decision to drop Seedance 1.x, confirming that the models are still operational via volcengine. Key changes include the addition of multiple 1.x model options in the README and integration guide, ensuring users can access these models for video generation. This restoration enhances the flexibility and options available for developers using the Seedance API.

items.title: Restoring Seedance 1.x Functionality in Skills 🚀
items.summary: This update reverts the previous decision to drop Seedance 1.x, confirming that it remains operational via volcengine with live POST responses returning 200. Key modifications include updates to the SKILL.md documentation, which now includes details about the 1.x models alongside the current 2.0 series. This change ensures continued support for users relying on the 1.x models.

items.title: Updated formal title for unified MCP documentation in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the title of the unified MCP documentation to a more formal H1, aligning it with the existing `Document.name` in production. The change enhances clarity and professionalism in the documentation. Only minor edits were made to the document's header.

items.title: Streamlined Seedance Models for 2.0 in A P Is 🚀
items.summary: This update removes outdated Seedance 1.x models from the documentation and model lists, aligning with the new 2.0-only OpenAPI specifications. Key files modified include the README and the integration guide, ensuring users have access to the latest model options. All tests for the bot and 2.0 functionality have passed successfully.

items.title: Streamline Seedance Models for 2.0 in Skills 🚀
items.summary: This update removes references to the outdated 1.x models from the SKILL.md documentation, focusing solely on the 2.0 series. The changes enhance clarity by trimming unnecessary information and emphasizing the new multimodal features of the 2.0 models. Overall, this cleanup supports a more efficient user experience for developers and users alike.

items.title: Enhance Seedance Video Generation API Documentation in A P Is 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces comprehensive documentation for the Seedance Video Generation API, filling a critical gap in the APIs monorepo. Key additions include detailed integration guides for both video generation and task management, along with a new README for the Seedance service. These enhancements ensure developers have the necessary resources to effectively utilize the Seedance API.

items.title: Update default model for Seedance CLI in Clis 🚀
items.summary: The default model for the Seedance CLI has been updated to `doubao-seedance-2-0-260128`, ensuring compatibility with the live worker. Key documentation and help strings have also been refreshed to reflect this change. Additionally, tests have been updated to assert the new default model, maintaining the integrity of the CLI functionality.

items.title: Enhance MCP Sync with Seedance 2.0 Features in M C Ps 🚀
items.summary: This update fully synchronizes the MCP server with Seedance 2.0 capabilities, adding support for the mini model, 4k resolution, and enhanced audio/video features. Key changes include updates to model types, configuration defaults, and tools for video generation, ensuring a seamless user experience. The README has also been revised to reflect these new features and pricing.

items.title: Sync Seedance Video Skill to 2.0 Capabilities in Skills 🎥
items.summary: The `seedance-video` skill has been updated to align with the Seedance 2.0 specifications, enhancing its functionality. Key changes include the introduction of new models, support for 4k resolution, and updated multimodal references for audio and video content. Additionally, the duration and frame range have been expanded, ensuring a more versatile user experience.
